title: Up Pops the Devil
writer: Frances Goodrich, Albert Hackett, Arthur Kober
actors: Richard 'Skeets' Gallagher, Stuart Erwin, Carole Lombard
plot: The marriage of an advertising man is jeopardized when he gets a chance to sell a novel he's been working on and quits his job to concentrate on writing. In order to support the family, the wife is forced to take a job as a dancer...
